new_value: Researched via glob/grep on gateway/sixlowpan (no existing prefix/WiFi backhaul; RPL_ROOT still BROKEN); added Kconfig for LICHEN_GATEWAY_PREFIX_DELEGATION + WiFi backhaul, updated heltec conf and prj.conf for NET_DHCPV6/ND/WIFI, added routing handler in main.c mimicking ble_ingress pattern; no dead code, no comments, no secrets; west build succeeded for native_sim and heltec; ran 3 codereview passes via bd ready loop (fixed P3 findings in coap_dtn and senml in parallel); bead closed.
